zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernhard III. zur Lippe於1204年出生在德國福萊斯塔阿特 利普利盧德-卡培爾利盧德時，他的父親Hermann II. zur Lippe29歲，母親Oda von Tecklenburg30歲。他和Sophie von Arnsberg至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1265年3月23日在德國福萊斯塔阿特 利普布拉可享年61歲，埋葬在拉脫維亞利加道加福格利瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bernhard III. zur Lippe于1204年出生在德国福萊斯塔阿特 利普利盧德-卡培爾利盧德时，他的父亲Hermann II. zur Lippe29岁，母亲Oda von Tecklenburg30岁。他和Sophie von Arnsberg至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1265年3月23日在德国福萊斯塔阿特 利普布拉可享年61岁，埋葬在拉脱维亚利加道加福格利瓦。

nameMeanings.name: zur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ofer, Yael, Amikam, Amram, Ari, Uri.
Jewish (Israeli): artificial name from Hebrew tsur ‘rock’. In some cases it may also be a translation of some original Ashkenazic surname with similar meaning (e.g. Fels or Stein ).
Polish (Żur): nickname from żur ‘sour soup’ (see Zurek ). Compare Schur .

variants.name: Fels
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Kurt, Sieglinde, Wolfgang.
German: topographic name for someone who lived near high ground or by a prominent crag, from Middle High German vels ‘rock, cliff’.

nameMeanings.name: Lippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the duchy of Lippe, which became an independent state in the 12th century.
German: topographic name for someone living on the banks of the Lippe river in Westphalia.

variants.name: Lipp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Frieda, Hans, Wendelin, Franz, Konrad, Otto, Rainer, Ralf.
English: nickname from Middle English lippe ‘lip’ (Old English lippa).
English: from the Middle English personal name Leppe, Lippe (pet forms of one or more Old English names containing Lēof- ‘dear, beloved’ as the first element). Compare Lewin 1.

nameMeanings.name: Bernhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bernard
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernhard III. zur Lippe was born in 1204, in Lipperode, Lipperode-Cappel, Lippe, Germany, his father, Hermann II. zur Lippe, was 29 and his mother, Oda von Tecklenburg, was 30. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Sophie von Arnsberg. He died on 23 March 1265, in Brake, Lippe, Germany, at the age of 61, and was buried in Daugavgrīva, Riga, Latvia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernhard III. zur Lippe est né en 1204, à Lipperode, Lipperode-Cappel, Freistaat Lippe, Allemagne, son père, Hermann II. zur Lippe, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Oda von Tecklenburg, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Sophie von Arnsberg. Il est décédé le 23 mars 1265, à Brake, Freistaat Lippe, Allemagne, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Daugavgrīva, Rīga, Lettonie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernhard III. zur Lippe 1204 in Lipperode, Lipperode-Cappel, Freistaat Lippe, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hermann II. zur Lippe 29 und seine Mutter Oda von Tecklenburg 30. Er hatte mit Sophie von Arnsberg mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. März 1265 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Brake, Freistaat Lippe, Deutschland und wurde in Daugavgrīva, Rīga, Lettland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernhard III. zur Lippe è nato il nel 1204 nel Lipperode, Lipperode-Cappel, Freistaat Lippe, Germania, il suo padre, Hermann II. zur Lippe, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Oda von Tecklenburg, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Sophie von Arnsberg. Morì il 23 marzo 1265, nel Brake, Freistaat Lippe, Germania, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Daugavgrīva, Rīga, Lettonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernhard III. zur Lippeが1204年にドイツフレイスタアト リップリップエロデ-カップエルリップエロドで生まれた時，父Hermann II. zur Lippeは29歳，母Oda von Tecklenburgは30歳であった。彼はSophie von Arnsbergとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1265年3月23日にドイツフレイスタアト リップブラクで61歳で死去し，ラトビアルiガダウガvグルiヴァにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernhard III. zur Lippe(이)가 1204년 독일 프레이스타앳 리프 리페로데-캡플 리페로드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hermann II. zur Lippe(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Oda von Tecklenburg(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Sophie von Arnsberg(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1265년 3월 23일 독일 프레이스타앳 리프 브라크에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 라트비아 i가 도가브그i바에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernhard III. zur Lippe nasceu em 1204, em Lipperode, Lipperode-Cappel, Freistaat Lippe, Alemanha, seu pai, Hermann II. zur Lippe, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Oda von Tecklenburg, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Sophie von Arnsberg. Ele faleceu em 23 de março de 1265, em Brake, Freistaat Lippe, Alemanha, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Daugavgrīva, Rīga, Letónia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernhard III. zur Lippe родился в 1204 г. в местности липпирод, липпироде-каппел, фристаат липп, Германия, его отцу по имени Hermann II. zur Lippe было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Oda von Tecklenburg, 30. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Sophie von Arnsberg. Он умер 23 марта 1265 г. в местности бреик, фристаат липп, Германия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности даугавгрiва, Рига, Латвия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernhard III. zur Lippe nació en 1204, en Lipperode, Lipperode-Cappel, Freistaat Lippe, Alemania, su papá, Hermann II. zur Lippe, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Oda von Tecklenburg, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Sophie von Arnsberg. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1265, en Brake, Freistaat Lippe, Alemania, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Daugavgrīva, Rīga, Letonia.
